name: Girl Explorer: Jigsaw Puzzles
description: Welcome to the bright and cheerful world of Girl Explorer: Jigsaw Puzzles! Join a curious young traveler and her funny animal friends as they explore colorful jungles, green valleys, sunny fields, and peaceful nature scenes. Along the way, they discover new places, enjoy little adventures, and meet friendly characters in every picture. This game features a lovely collection of colorful jigsaw puzzles created for kids and puzzle fans. Choose your favorite picture, select a difficulty level, and put the pieces together to reveal the full scene. Each completed puzzle unlocks the next image, making the journey more fun step by step. With simple controls, bright artwork, and relaxing gameplay, Girl Explorer: Jigsaw Puzzles is a great choice for children and anyone who enjoys calm, friendly puzzle games. Start playing, complete all the pictures, and enjoy a happy adventure full of color and imagination!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Drag and drop puzzle pieces to the correct place
